texto: It was a symposium of horror and heroism, the like of which has not been known in the civilized world since man established his dominion over the sea.
autor: The Sinking of the Titanic and Great Sea Disasters
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a The Sinking of the Titanic and Great Sea Disasters: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a tempo. O trecho “It was a symposium of horror and heroism, the like of which has not been known in the civilized w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, chivalry, disaster pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de disaster e gallant.

texto: Many of those who elected to remain might have escaped. 'Chivalry' is a mild appellation for their conduct. Some of the vaunted knights of old were desperate cowards by comparison. A fight in the open field, or jousting in the tournament, did not call out the manhood in a man as did the waiting till the great ship took the final plunge, in the knowledge that the seas round about were covered with loving and yearning witnesses whose own salvation was not assured.
autor: The Sinking of the Titanic and Great Sea Disasters
